name: ShimmerButton
description: A button with a CSS gradient sweep highlight on hover, drawing attention to primary CTAs.

shimmerWidth.description: Width of the shimmer gradient band

duration.description: Duration of the shimmer sweep in seconds

slots.name: children
slots.description: Button label text or icon content

layout.description: Renders as an inline-flex button element. Drop-in replacement for standard buttons.

aiPromptHint: Use ShimmerButton for primary CTAs that need visual emphasis. The sweep highlight draws attention on hover. Customize shimmerColor to match your brand. Works as a drop-in button replacement.

examples.title: Branded shimmer color
examples.code:
<ShimmerButton
  shimmerColor="rgba(238,80,44,0.2)"
  className="bg-neutral-900 text-white border border-neutral-700"
>
  Launch App
</ShimmerButton>

examples.title: Slow shimmer
examples.code:
<ShimmerButton duration={3} className="bg-gradient-to-r from-purple-600 to-pink-600 text-white">
  Explore
</ShimmerButton>
